calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Dec-17-2002 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for hearing this day. Commissioner: Loretta M. Norris; Clerk: P. Dias; Reporter: Floyd Butler. Charles Zhang was sworn as the Cantonese Interpreter for the plaintiff. Plaintiff, Xiao Yan Zhang was sworn and examined. The whereabouts of the father unknown and the Court deems the child effectively abandoned by the father. Court grants Decree changing minor's name to Calvin Zhang. Decree signed in open court.
